description:
Perform a capability audit of the OpenICE source code. Identify medical device manufacturers with implemented drivers in the source code repository at /opt/openice/mdpnp and determine if they have corresponding simulated adapters available in the OpenICE Supervisor application. Create a report at /home/ga/Desktop/device_driver_audit.txt listing at least 4 distinct manufacturers. For each entry, include the Manufacturer Name, the directory path to its driver code, and whether a simulated adapter is available in the GUI (Yes/No).

Example format:
Manufacturer: Philips
Path: /opt/openice/mdpnp/...
Simulation Available: No
